overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character exploring a medieval stone building at night. The character enters from a dark exterior into torchlit corridors, ascends a winding staircase, and discovers an NPC hiding in a wardrobe on the upper floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley entrance to historic stone building

events.description: character enters stone building from dark exterior through wooden door
transition from dim exterior to warm torchlit interior corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the heavy wooden door and stepping inside the stone building

entered.detail: rough stone wall facade with weathered texture and wooden entrance
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm orange glow on stone wall
heavy wooden door with metal studs and arched stone frame

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a medieval stone building at night, illuminated by a single wall lantern. At approximately 3.5 seconds, the character opens the heavy wooden door and steps inside, transitioning from the dark exterior into a torchlit stone corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: torchlit stone corridor with arched ceilings and wooden furniture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor observing the stone architecture and wall-mounted torches

entered.detail: stone corridor with rounded arch ceilings and rough plaster walls
wall-mounted torches providing warm flickering illumination
simple wooden tables pushed against the corridor wall
wooden benches aligned along the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a narrow stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The rough stone walls are lined with simple wooden tables and benches. The warm firelight casts dancing shadows as the character moves deeper into the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor intersection with stone staircase to upper floor

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: navigating through the corridor, turning toward the staircase and climbing to the upper floor

entered.detail: wall-mounted fire source with visible flames
worn stone steps winding upward with wooden railing
simple wooden handrail along the staircase
small rectangular opening in the stone wall

elements.scene_description: The character continues through the corridor past a burning wall brazier, then turns toward a stone staircase. At 26 seconds, the character begins ascending the worn stone steps with wooden railing, moving from the ground floor toward the upper level of the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: small upper room with storage furniture and hanging herbs

events.description: character opens wooden wardrobe revealing a person hiding inside

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden wardrobe and opening the doors to reveal the occupant inside

notable_agents.action: standing inside the wardrobe, revealed when the doors open

entered.detail: tall dark wooden wardrobe with double doors against the wall
bundles of dried plants hanging from the ceiling
wooden table or counter with items on surface

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the upper floor, the character enters a small room containing a large wooden wardrobe and dried herbs hanging from the ceiling. At 36 seconds, the character opens the wardrobe doors, revealing an NPC standing inside, marking a sudden interaction moment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, nocturnal exterior into the warm, torchlit depths of a medieval stone building. It begins with the character approaching a heavy wooden door illuminated by a single wall lantern before stepping inside to transition from the night air into a flickering stone corridor. As the character moves deeper, the scene shifts through narrow hallways where wall-mounted torches cast dancing shadows across rough stone walls and simple wooden furniture. The camera then ascends to the upper floor, entering a small room filled with hanging dried herbs. Finally, the movement culminates as the character opens a large wooden wardrobe to reveal a hidden NPC standing inside.
